title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Dove India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Dove India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, Dove India in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dove India:
Dove India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dove India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
